title: Career Guidance Programmes
text:
Career Guidance Programmes - SupportGoWhere
Career Guidance Programmes
Share link
Polaris is a suite of personalised career guidance programmes designed for individuals looking to elevate their careers through career planning.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Polaris suite of programmes are SkillsFuture Credit-eligible
Programmes range from two months to three months in duration
Collapse all sections
About this support

Personalised career guidance by a credentialed career coach to help you make informed career decisions

Tailored Career Development Plan to support your professional growth

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents

How to apply?

Tailor your personalised career development plan with expert guidance and support from credentialed career coaches.

Where can I find help?

View more details

WSG Hotline: 6883 5885

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 08 Apr 2026
